text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Some time has passed since I became Sasami
Anshinzawa's acupuncture test dummy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After heading out with her, I would train to
become more Umamusume-like and receive
acupuncture treatment. One such day...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Good, good! ♪ Your body's shaping up just the
way I like! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Now you should be able to participate on that
legendary stage that everyone dreams of—

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: The Needle Series!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: What?! You've never heard of it?!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
The Needle Series is the highlight of the
acupuncture world, where
acupuncture-augmented humans are pitted
against each other in races!
choice_data_list: And... you want me to participate in it?
And... you want me to participate in it?

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Precisely! ♪ We're an unstoppable duo together,
with you as the runner and me as the trainer! Our
victory is practically guaranteed!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
...Why, what's this? You don't seem all that
excited!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Listen, once you experience running in a race
yourself, you'll be able to apply what you learn in
your trainee's training sessions!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Watching a race and running one are two
completely different things! Haven't you realized
this from your training up till now? You must
have!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Don't you want <chrname> to
improve? Don't you want to help her achieve her
dreams?!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Well then, you have no choice but to enter this
competition! Then you'll have no worries in the
world! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
That's the spirit! All right, it's decided! Now that
that's finalized, let's go get you signed up! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
If you manage to win it all, people will come to
recognize my skills too, so it'll be two birds with one
stone! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And that's how my partnership with Sasami
Anshinzawa begins!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Now then, our goal is to dominate the Needle
Series, and to do that, we'll have to win the
Sasabari Sho! ☆

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Of course, you can't enter it right away—you'll
need to accumulate plenty of racing experience
to qualify!
choice_data_list: I-I wasn't expecting this series to be so legit...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
First off, let's set our sights on winning the
Bamboo Stakes! ♪ Aaand to do that...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
You're going to have to undergo more advanced
training. ♪ I'd say we'll need to ramp training up
to level five!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Do a volleyball dive!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Next up, some rapid doggy paddling! Wow,
you're crazy fast! ☆

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Karate chop that tile! Yaaah! No worries!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
No worries! No worries! Good, keep pulling that
tire in time with the chant! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Lastly, you will face me in shogi! Do you have
what it takes to—no way, did you just put me in
check already?!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Hey, great job toda—whoa! You're looking pretty
burnt-out!
choice_data_list: My body can't handle any more of this...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! ♪ Don't worry, you can count on your dear
trainer to provide an extra special treatment as a
reward for your hard work! ☆

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: To the infirmary! Let's go, go, go!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Now, this is the Rest in Peace chakra, and when I
poke it, all your fatigue will be washed away! ♪
choice_data_list: That's not a very reassuring name...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Oh come on, don't be like that! The texts I read definitely described it that way!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Enough chitchat! Annnd poke!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When I come to my senses, I find myself standing
in an unfamiliar place. The last thing I remember,
I was receiving acupuncture treatment, but...
Trainer... Trainer, canst thou hear me?

I am the god of acupuncture... Ye who seeketh
the zenith of the Needle Series, I hereby bestow
upon thee mine blessings...

text_block_list.name: God of Acupuncture(?)
text_block_list.text:
O Trainer, dost thou desireth the power to attain
glory?

text_block_list.name: God of Acupuncture(?)
text_block_list.text:
Nay, thou needn't answer, for I know thou cravest
it so. Very well, allow me to fulfill thy desire!

text_block_list.name: God of Acupuncture(?)
text_block_list.text: Annnd poketh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Puncture Perfect!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
An almighty feeling flows throughout my body. So
this is the power bestowed by the gods!
choice_data_list: O kindly god, thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: God of Acupuncture(?)
text_block_list.text:
Hohoho... Whilst thou art at it, please look after
that fool of an acupuncturist as well...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you're finally awake. I bet you feel nice and
refreshed, don't you? Looks like it was a great
success!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Whatever that was, my body is feeling better
than ever. All traces of my fatigue seem to have
vanished.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I knew it all along—acupuncture is the solution to
everything! ♪ No worries! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So this is the power bestowed by the gods? It's
not quite as miraculous as I thought it'd be.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If anything, I feel as though my vitality is being
steadily drained from my body!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Wha—? That's strange... There's no way that I,
divine acupuncturist as I am, would ever slip up
during treatment!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Eh, whatever! Thank you for your patronage, and
come again! ☆

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you're finally awake. You were tossing and
turning in your sleep a lot.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Anyways, I'm heading on home! See you!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I missed that chakra point by a millimeter, but
that probably didn't cause any lasting issues,
right?! Nah, definitely not!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't know whether to blame the botched
acupuncture or the weird dream, but either way...
My fatigue doesn't improve in the slightest.
